concerns.text: T035 handles 'LLM inference timeout for 6-hour GitHub Actions limit' but spec edge case requires handling 'LLM model exceeds 6-hour GitHub Actions job time limit during participant sessions' — task covers inference timeout, not full job-level limit (semantic weakening of edge case coverage)

T011 allows 'document alternative OR verify CPU-tractable model' for JaCoText gap, but FR-013 mandates JaCoText for Java. If alternative is documented without spec amendment, this silently relaxes FR-013 (Constitution II requires verified source before proceeding)
T045 exports results but lacks explicit traceability mechanism to verify single-source-of-truth per Constitution IV (every statistic must trace to exactly one row in data/ and one block in code/)
T055a updates state file timestamp per Constitution V but relies on manual execution with no automated trigger — task exists but could be strengthened with automation to ensure versioning discipline

No explicit task to run Reference-Validator Agent on JaCoText citation per Constitution II (verified accuracy gate requires verification before contributing review points; plan flags JaCoText as unverified source)
